prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为 27736→29714→30376→40816→34888，整体呈后移趋势；2024 年因选科要求调整（物化绑定）出现大幅后移至 40816，2025 年反弹至 34888，近 3 年累计后移约 4500 名，2025 年基准约 34888 名；该校在江苏物理类计划 2021 年 97 人、2022 年 96 人、2023 年 98 人、2024 年 97 人、2025 年 98 人，2026 年增至 104 人，较 2025 年扩招约 6.1%，扩招使竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 73 名，近年排名在 60–73 之间波动，整体处于中上水平；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉信号中无明显负面或正面事件，抖音热度未进入总排名前 106 名，关注度一般；未见投档断档记录，报考心理平稳；该校以石油石化特色见长，石油与天然气工程为传统优势领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，对物理类考生吸引力强；江苏省物理类考生 2021 年 16.6 万→2025 年 26.1 万持续增长，2026 年全省普通高考总人数 52.1 万，按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算约 37.5 万人，较 2025 年大幅增加约 44%，竞争显著加剧；省控线（本科批）从 2021 年 417 分升至 2025 年 463 分，反映整体竞争强度上升；该校位于山东青岛，非本省院校；在江苏招生占比约 3–4%（2025 年约 130 人/全国约 3570 人），跨省招生规模中等，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年扩招约 6.1% 的缓解效应与江苏省物理类考生大幅增加约 44% 的竞争加剧效应，扩招不足以抵消考生增量带来的竞争压力，预计位次在 2025 年基准 34888 名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 36200 名，区间 35700–36700 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 27736→29714→30376→40816→34888, showing an overall backward trend; in 2024, due to adjustment in subject selection requirements (physics-chemistry binding), there was a significant backward shift to 40816, rebounding to 34888 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4500 places over the past 3 years, and a baseline of approximately 34888 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu for Physics Category was 97 in 2021, 96 in 2022, 98 in 2023, 97 in 2024, 98 in 2025, and increased to 104 in 2026, an expansion of about 6.1% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, fluctuating between 60 and 73 in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level; no significant negative or positive events in reputation signals from 2021 to 2026, with Douyin popularity not entering the top 106 overall, indicating average attention; no records of filing gaps, stable application psychology; the university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum and natural gas engineering as traditional advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province grew from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, and in 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in the province is 521,000, estimated at about 375,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72%, a significant increase of about 44% compared to 2025, sharply intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, reflecting increased overall competition intensity; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local institution; its enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 3–4% (approximately 130 out of about 3,570 nationwide in 2025), with a medium cross-provincial enrollment scale and no obvious regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the easing effect of about 6.1% expansion in 2026, and the intensifying competition from a significant increase of about 44% in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province, the expansion is insufficient to offset the competitive pressure from the increase in candidates; it is expected that the ranking will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 34,888; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36,200, with a range of 35,700–36,700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 35,700–36,700, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is better than the lower limit (≤35,700), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (≥36,700), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第 73 名，理工类院校在文科招生规模较小，整体层次稳定；该校在声誉信号中无明显事件，抖音热度未上榜，报考心理平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类仅招会计学、英语、建筑学三个专业，会计学社会热度偏热（考公优势），英语热度一般观望；江苏省历史类考生 2024 年 9.2 万→2025 年 9.7 万，2026 年全省普通高考总人数 52.1 万，按近年历史类占比约 28% 估算约 14.6 万人，较 2025 年增长约 50%，竞争显著加剧；省控线（本科批）从 2024 年 478 分升至 2025 年 482 分，小幅上升；该校位于山东青岛，非本省院校；在江苏历史类招生规模极小（5–7 人），跨省招生占比低。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移的热度惯性、2026 年扩招 40% 的显著缓解效应与历史类考生大幅增加约 50% 的竞争加剧效应，扩招与考生增量基本对冲，但热度惯性使位次不会大幅后移；预测最低位次约 7217 名，区间 6717–7717 名。

历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were 7859→5796 respectively, with a forward shift of approximately 2063 places in 2025 compared to 2024, indicating a significant increase in popularity; the 2025 baseline is approximately 5796. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu was 5 students in 2024, 5 students in 2025, and increased to 7 students in 2026, an expansion of 40% compared to 2025, which has a substantial driving effect on the backward shift of rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 73rd on the Soft Science main list; science and engineering universities have a small enrollment scale in liberal arts, with a stable overall level; there are no significant events in the university's reputation signals, and it is not listed in Douyin popularity, with stable application psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Only three majors are offered in History Category: Accounting, English, and Architecture. Accounting has a relatively high social popularity (advantageous for civil service exams), while English has a generally neutral popularity. The number of History Category examinees in Jiangsu was 92,000 in 2024→97,000 in 2025, and the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is 521,000, estimated at approximately 146,000 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 28%, an increase of about 50% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 478 points in 2024 to 482 points in 2025, a slight increase. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local institution; the enrollment scale for History Category in Jiangsu is extremely small (5–7 students), with a low proportion of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the momentum of the significant forward shift in rankings in 2025, the notable alleviation effect of the 40% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensifying competition due to the approximately 50% increase in History Category examinees, the enrollment expansion and the increase in examinees largely offset each other, but the momentum of popularity prevents a significant backward shift in rankings; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7217, with a range of 6717–7717.
